summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 9→Jul 15 vs Jul 2→Jul 8* · Revenue -9% (1,030,405 vs 1,126,168 EGP) · Spend -8% · ROAS 5.73 (-1%).
   • CPC: 2.29 → 2.2 EGP (-4%, ~flat)
   • CVR: 1.14% → 1.04% (-9%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,157 → 1,217 EGP (+5%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 50%* of the move (hurt, -99,524 EGP)  ·  *AOV 28%* of the move (helped, +50,820 EGP)  ·  *CPC 22%* of the move (helped, +7,360 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -9%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-99,524 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -1%.
     Revenue -9% because spend -8%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *lblb beach bag essentials*, its CVR went 3.59%→2.43% on 9,838 EGP spend (~43% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 9→Jul 15 vs Jul 2→Jul 8* · Revenue +162% (190,730 vs 72,873 EGP) · Spend +135% · ROAS 4.26 (+12%).
   • CPC: 8.78 → 9.94 EGP (+13%, up (drag))
   • CVR: 1.79% → 2.53% (+41%, up (good))
   • AOV: 1,869 → 1,673 EGP (-10%, down (drag))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 60%* of the move (helped, +55,810 EGP)  ·  *CPC 21%* of the move (hurt, -5,229 EGP)  ·  *AOV 19%* of the move (hurt, -22,344 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* rose +41%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *55,810 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS +12%.
     Revenue +162% because spend +135%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255254193100011|Split screenfloral outfit capcut birdnest>, its CVR went 0.0%→2.33% on 3,759 EGP spend (~20% of the swing).
